arts.ttl: Manchester United wanted to sign me - but I joined Man City because the training was better
arts.sum: Nico O'Reilly has come through the ranks at Manchester City having turned down the chance to join United's academy

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Red Devils urged to sell Bruno Fernandes as Paul Pogba drops hint
arts.sum: Manchester United were beaten 2-0 by Arsenal and 3-2 at home to Nottingham Forest in successive games and Ruben Amorim may now be tempted to bring in recruits in January to strengthen his struggling side

arts.ttl: Liverpool wanted star who frustrated Man City as agent reveals transfer snub - 'We said no'
arts.sum: Juventus goalkeeper Michele Di Gregorio has turned heads after his impressive display to frustrate Manchester City, and Liverpool were one of the clubs interested in him before joining the Turin side

arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Manchester United - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time
arts.sum: The latest Manchester City and Manchester United news as the first Manchester derby of the season takes place this weekend at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City host Man Utd in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star makes emphatic Ruben Amorim comments after being Erik ten Hag's main man
arts.sum: Lisandro Martinez was Erik ten Hag's No.1 choice in defence as he replaced Harry Maguire when the Dutchman dumped the England defender - but now he's fully backing Ruben Amorim's new style at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Manchester City Predicted Lineup vs. Manchester United: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester City hosts Manchester United looking to keep their Premier League title hopes alive.

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Manchester City: Premier League
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will manage his first Manchester derby when Man United visit Man City at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs. Manchester United: Preview, Team News, Lineups
arts.sum: Manchester City hosts Manchester United in the first Manchester derby of the 2024–5 Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals what would make him QUIT Manchester City job amid alarming slump - but beleaguered boss sends defiant message ahead of derby with United
arts.sum: City go into Sunday afternoon's Manchester derby with just one win in 10 and suffered a miserable 2-0 defeat at the hands of Juventus in midweek.
